description: Georeference the local survey dataset from 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\local_boundary_survey.csv' into a real-world projected coordinate system using TopoCal. Transform the dataset so that Point 1 aligns with Easting 481020.500, Northing 4398100.250, and Point 2 aligns with Easting 481150.850, Northing 4398175.400. The transformation must apply to all 60 points while keeping Z (Elevation) values unchanged. Export the georeferenced point list to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\TopoCal\georeferenced_points.csv'.
